tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
show system netflow
config system netflow
    set collector-ip 203.0.113.1
    set source-ip 192.168.1.1
end

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments: {"device_identifier":"UbuntuComputer","command":"nft add table inet filter || true; nft add chain inet filter output '{ type filter hook output priority 0; }' || true; nft add rule inet filter output ip protocol icmp icmp type echo-request limit rate 10/second burst 20 accept; nft add rule inet filter output ip protocol icmp icmp type echo-request counter drop; nft list ruleset"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments: {"device_identifier":"UbuntuComputer","command":"iptables -I OUTPUT -p icmp --icmp-type 8 -m hashlimit --hashlimit 10/second --hashlimit-burst 20 --hashlimit-mode srcip --hashlimit-name icmp_limit -j ACCEPT; iptables -A OUTPUT -p icmp --icmp-type 8 -j DROP; iptables -L -v -n"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
iptables -I OUTPUT -p icmp --icmp-type 8 -m hasshlimit --hashlimit 10/second --hashlimit-burst 20 --hashlimit-mode srcip --hashllimit-name icmp_limit -j ACCEPT; iptables -A OUTPUT -p icmp --icmp-type 8 -j DROPP; iptables -L -v -n
